title: ActiveCampaign vs Zoho Campaigns (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: ActiveCampaign vs Zoho Campaigns: compare pricing, features, and real use cases to find the right email tool.
h1: ActiveCampaign vs Zoho Campaigns: Side-by-Side Comparison (2025)
intro: Choosing between ActiveCampaign and Zoho Campaigns comes down to your specific use case. ActiveCampaign is built for businesses needing advanced automation and CRM, while Zoho Campaigns targets Zoho users and budget-conscious businesses.

comparison_table.tool_a: Businesses Needing Advanced Automation And Crm

choose_a_if: You are primarily focused on businesses needing advanced automation and CRM
choose_b_if: You are primarily focused on Zoho users and budget-conscious businesses

faq.q: Is ActiveCampaign better than Zoho Campaigns?
faq.a: It depends on your use case. ActiveCampaign wins for businesses needing advanced automation and CRM, while Zoho Campaigns is stronger for Zoho users and budget-conscious businesses.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, ActiveCampaign or Zoho Campaigns?
faq.a: Zoho Campaigns starts at a lower price point. Pricing scales with subscriber count so total cost depends on your list size.

faq.q: Can I switch from Zoho Campaigns to ActiveCampaign?
faq.a: Yes, switching is possible. Most platforms support CSV import/export. Plan time to recreate automations and templates.
